name: Push Notifications (ntfy)
description: Self-hosted push notifications via ntfy. Instant delivery to any device with the ntfy app.
author: Crow

env_vars.name: NTFY_TOPIC
env_vars.description: Notification topic name (unique to your instance)

env_vars.name: NTFY_AUTH_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Access token for private topics (leave empty for open topics on local network)

notes: Install the ntfy app on your phone (Android/iOS) and subscribe to your topic for instant push notifications. Works over Tailscale.
